source_description: Derived from a machine state where both the legacy ~/.genesis/config.yaml (Desktop-app era) and the canonical ~/Library/Application Support/genesis-core/config.toml coexist. Two MCP servers registered. Two sessions with different providers. Two cron jobs (one with the Desktop-app 'schedule' field alias, one smoke-check job). Two plan files. All PII and secrets removed.

files_sanitized.source_type: legacy IJFW-era YAML config (Desktop app writes)

redactions: session.directory path (was a real absolute home path — replaced with <<GENESIS_HOME>>)

files_sanitized.source_type: Desktop-app cron job store (jobs.json with 'schedule' field alias)

redactions: cwd (was a real absolute home path — replaced with <<HOME>>/dev/...)

files_sanitized.source_type: wcore session file (v1 schema, different provider)

uuid_map.00000000-0001-4000-8000-000000000001: original was UUID v4 (cron job id — GitHub Grabber)

scenarios_that_replay_this: T6: dual-config resolution order (config.yaml wins / config.toml wins / merge)
T6: Desktop-app 'schedule' cron alias deserializes to 'expression' field
T6: multi-MCP server boot without leaking host GENESIS_IMG_API_KEY into engine env
T6: cron list shows both jobs with correct next_run_at
